review_text: We had a great week long stay here. A great base for the fishermen in our family as we could park the tinny in the water out front of our campsite. The facilities were clean and modern. Our kids loved the space and the ability to run around on the field and kick a footy. It was great to watch the local AFL games over the weekend also. The office staff/caretakers were so helpful and friendly. Our dogs also loved meeting all the other dogs and having their daily walks on the grounds. The proximity to the town centre was excellent and it was easy to access most things from camp. Thankyou for a lovely stay.

Great place to stay. Cheapest caravan park ive stayed at on my trip down the coast. Central to everything at lakes Entrance.
They looked after me when me vehicle broke down. Cant recommend enough.
Good Caravan Park. Good amenities location is handy to main shopping area and the Inland estuary. Paid $38 pn.
Best place to stay, will comeback here many times.
Great place great value definitely the best show ground we have stayed at this holiday.

Never had such an awful welcome at any campground besides this one, I have been to several camping grounds all over VIC and even some in NSW but the staff there was so disrespectful, we didn’t even cause any harm to anyone but lookslike they were just irritated of some other nationality coming to their grounds, they were rude and even told us to take the camps and leave and all because when we drove in the music was a bit loud, but it was afternoon and we were also enjoying they could have told politely but they didn’t. When the sun set and there was dark even the lights on the pole were not working, idk what’s the matter but light is for dark we struggled so much with light. I would never suggest such an bad camping grounds and service to anyone.
Right on the water, the cleanest toilets and showers! Sites are very small.
Awesome campground

Great value park. A little squashy. Heaps of vans but very clean
Staff very helpful and friendly.
Clean amenities

A good area for camping.  Powered or unpowered sites right on the waters edge of North Arm.  Clean, fresh amenities and new camp kitchen.  A short 5min stroll to the shops.  Right beside the Bowling Club for a few refreshments or a meal.  Quite and no road noise.
Really great camp site. Beautiful views and sunset. Everything is clean and the prices are reasonable. Wish we could stay longer.
Unpowered sites slightly cramped

Unpowered site for a few nights.
Very close to all the things you might need.
Can't comment in the rooms sorry.
Densely packed though.

Recommended 👍

Basically just an area to park your can, caravan and throw down your swag and use as a base. Services were clean and well maintained. Waterfront spots were good but fence in the way. Can walk to anywhere from here - 15mins to main beach, less to anywhere else. Windy as hell when I was there, so slept in the car as the tents were like a plastic bag being shaken. Overall, I do recommend for adults. Not much for kids to do there.

It's another showgrounds! We keep hitting these sites because they are usually well equipped. This one no different. I imagine it's lovely if it wasn't freezing, windy, and raining... sigh! However, Darren is great, helpful, and cheerful. There is an awesome coffee shop walking distance called Bones. Woolworths is also walking distance. Can't ask for more.  Good spot, highly recommend it. If it isn't freezing, windy, and raining...
Camp around the local football ground, small amenity block with camp kitchen which is nice and new. Close to shops and all that lake entrance has to offer.
Very central park, can even Moore your boat behind the van

We travel in a motorhome so location to shops etc are important.
This campsite is on the beach, 5 min walk to pretty much everything you need, Kmart, woolies, maccas, cafes the list goes on.
Took our 2 dogs we all had a great time. Reception staff really helpful rang us to let us know they had changed our site before we arrived, left all paperwork in post box out side reception. Amenities spotless and new.
We will definately be back.
Beautiful place. Lovely owners. They were very helpful and kind. Thank you for everything.

Wir waren mit einem Camper auf dem Caravanplatz. Es ist eine sehr schöne Lokation. Direkt am Wasser gelegen mit einem großen Sportplatz in der Mitte. Es gibt Stellplätze mit eigenem Strandabschnitt. Die Sanitäranlagen und die Küche waren neu und sauber. Allerdings waren es zu wenig Toilette und Duschen die morgens überfüllt waren. Der Platz ist ideal zum Campen mit Hund.
Good location right on the water and walking distance to shops etc. Facilities were clean and modern. Big plus for being able to have a camp fire as well, overall a nice caravan park.
Good place, the atmosphere is very nice and amenities clean but if you have an unpowered site the amenities are far

This is a council owned sports oval which has excellent clean facilities within the central part of town. Walk to many shops. Waterside camping spots in the main. We have visited here on various holidays. Bird life is enormous. The wind and heat were very strong one day so come prepared. The camp kitchen and toilet/shower block are modern and spotlessly clean. Could just about swim directly from your camp site. We used their onsite power and water which is optional. Any setup from enormous caravan to a simple tent is ok. 4x hours from our place in melbourne is a easy drive.
Great amenities,  clean, accessible,  grounds kept beautifully. Great value.
Clean modern toilets, good views
A lovely place to camp by the water and a short walk to the shops and the jetty. The amenities are amazingly clean and cared for. Highly recommend it.
Great value powered site on lakefront. Close to everything, walkable to shops, beach, clubs, etc. New amenities, some new slabs, other grassy sites. I advise prebooking. It's a popular spot.

Central, clean and value for money
Sites are close together though

Mooie nette camping. Zeer mooie buitenkeuken. Was en toilet blok super schoon en nieuw. Interessant om naast het rugbyveld te staan. De beste prijs kwaliteit die  we in drie weken zijn tegen gekomen!
Aanrader.

We weren't expecting to be camping around the edge of a sports field but it was lovely non the less. there are no security barriers so be aware of that as people needing access to field. Lovely pitches right next to the water with access next to the small beaches.

Amenities are the best we've come across with super clean toilets and showers with plenty of space.

Very noisy birds
Friendly staff, easy walking distance to shops and the town, clean amenities, beautiful views!

Beautiful spot to stay in our caravan. The park was clean, has adequate facilities to shower, wash clothing and use the toilet.
Are view was amazing 👏 😍 and was walking distance to most services needed, safeway, kmart and more.

Pretty decent. Unfortunately the site we were allocated was the furthest possible one away from the bathrooms so was a bit of a trek in the dark. The lake is really pretty and we seen lots of ducks and pelicans. Amenities were good too.
Great cheap spot right in heart of Lakes Entrance. Bathrooms clean and has everything you need!
Beautiful camp site by the river. Clean facilities. Definitely be back!

What a fantastic campsite. We have travelled for six weeks down from Cairns and this is hands down the best value, best views, service and amenities! Clean toilets and showers which were lovely and hot. Quiet location a stones throw away from all the shops, attractions and some fantastic walks. They also hire out fire pit with wood which we had and absolutely loved! We stayed for two days wish it was longer! Thank you
Great park, dodgy management.
Beautiful spot but a caravan park not free like google suggests

Top spot!!! Can't comment on the rooms if indeed there are any cause I had my own camper. I only booked it an hour out from arriv8ng & was given a waterfront site. I've been travelling Aussie for well over a month now and this camp ground is one of the cheapest & nicest I've stayed in yet. Bridie at reception was wonderful & communicated very well as I drove towards them.

Good camp ground close to town and shops, stayed 1 night but any more would have probably stayed in a caravan park,  only 1 amenities block to cover whole area which would be tight in summer, has 60ish powered sites and 12 unpowered. $35 per night power & water. Great views as right on water edge, be sure to book ahead as very popular, caretakers are very helpful and easy to deal with.
Loved our stay here. Great site right by the lake. Walking distance to Shops Clubs Esplanade
Great spot on the water,with new facilities. Kept very clean
Stayed over for one night in caravan... On waters edge = breathtaking spot..

Great camp site!!! Toilets, shower rooms and kitchen area are always looked after. Friendly staff.
Overall clean and organized. Pet friendly!!
Highly recommended 🙌🙌
Affordable, walking distance to town and by the river
Great place right on the water, good size sites, immaculate amenities, and friendly staff. Also,  value for money 💰
We ABSOLUTLY LOVE staying here on our FAVOURITE unpowered corner spot...

This caravan park is lovely with new and clean toilet/ shower facilities. Lovely staff and grounds all kept. Most caravans were backed up to the lake with lovely afternoon sunsets. Highly recommend. And you need to book a few weeks ahead to get a good spot.
Lovely spot on the water to relax, can get very busy
Great views, easy set up, good facilities.
Top spot  staff very nice an the food from Cathey kitchen is the best very welcome guys from Leanne cabin 6
Perfect spot to get away, sites are clean and quiet.

Fantastic pet friendly  location on the water  in a unique and pretty little town .  Walking distance to beaches , shops, & places to eat out. Great service from caretakers  , well maintained grassy sites , nice clean amenities and good camp kitchen  . We loved our 4 nights here :)
Netter Campingplatz mit sauberen Badezimmern, Waschmaschinen und nettem Personal.
Clean, brand new showers and toilets, close to  the water , woollies,  petrol station, kmart, reject and good price $35.00 powered sites . I will be back for sure
We stayed with our caravan overnight. It was a nice clean spot. The amenities are new and clean. Well done.

We stayed in a non powered site and were right in the water. Site number 6 or 5 are the choice (in that order). Very quiet, lovely amenities and a short walk to town and over the bridge to the beach. Highly recommended.

Great location nice views but they allow people to wash there dogs in showers and people brushing thier teeth in the camp kitchen. When I told her she had a go at me and told me to mind my own business its a health hazard.😡😡
Nice spot and a lovely town. We fed the black swans every day

They were booked out, but the lady at reception found a spot for us anyway. We ended up on a good large spot and near the waters edge. Modern clean facilities and helpful staff, so all round a good spot to stay. It may pay to book ahead as I think it is a popular caravan park. $35 a night. All very good. Jim
Nice big area, good playground for kids and of course, a beach!
Immaculate facilities beautiful and green nice and quiet would stay here again for sure. By the lake you can’t ask for more.

great spot with pleasant views, new facilities.
No concentration camp crush here
Great Caravan Park, nice to camp right on water 🤩
Beautiful campground right in the waterfront. Amenities are clean and top notch. Staff are pleasant and always willing to help out where they can. Perfect place to set up camp.

Asked us to leave 1 week into stay and told us not to come back
Accused us of swearing and carrying on when there where parties happening 2 sites down and we were sitting by a fire relaxing
Discrimination against autism and other mental health!!!!
We had stuff stolen off our site regardless of locks
Toilets weren't cleaned found bugs inside and a whole heap of toilet rolls unchanged
Over priced for wood
Rude receptionist
And took more than half of what I paid for the site for 2 weeks

awesome place to camp.  reasonable prices and good caretaker.  However needs to be more proactive with dogs.  In the unpowered site dog was allowed to crap on ground and it was not picked up. Have rego no of owner.

Der sauberste und gepflegteste Campingplatz auf dem ich je war…und ich war schon auf vielen! Die Toiletten und Duschräume sind sehr sauber und modern. Beim Grillbereich und beim Spülplatz lag kein Krümel! Auch den Waschraum haben wir benutzt und waren begeistert. Die Waschmaschinen sind sehr sauber und man hat die Möglichkeit einen Trockner oder die Wäscheleinen draußen zu nutzen. Unser Stellplatz lag direkt am Wasser und es war wirklich wunderschön. Das Personal war super nett und hilfsbereit. Die Lage ist zudem Top und alles ist Fußläufig gut zu erreichen. Ich kann diesen Campingplatz wirklich nur empfehlen:)!!

Awesome camp site! We are here for two night (Sept), easy to get a water front view that’s amazing!
The facilities like brand new!

4 mins walk to woolies and 7mins walk to the main lake entrance.

Superb!
Enjoyed our 2 day stopover here in Lakes Entrance. Clean facilities, waterfront site. Not too crowded in the winter, very lucky with the weather. Might be a bit boggy in the rain.
Great time to visit this time of the year

Excellent place to enjoy a break with site running around the sports grounds and prime viewing for the football if you are here on game days.
Very clean and tidy place with top facilities including dump point.
Great prices. Large Fire pits available for hire and fire wood for sale at office.
Community sporting ground with a Great camping area right on the lake, powered and unpowered sites, amenities clean, friendly staff and easy walk into the lovely town.

Enjoyed 3 nights. Unfortunately we couldn't get right on the water but we could see it. The caretakers were friendly. The amenities very clean. We had a visit from a family of swans. Mum, dad and 5 cygnets. Amazing. The male one came very close to me. Close to the water and shops.
Caravan sight very good. Close to town centre and the esplanade. Lots of Caravans here at the same time but all good.  Would recommend this place to stay at.

A brilliant campsite right on the waterfront. Toilet/shower/kitchen were so clean and the site is a short walk to the main surf beach. A gorgeous family of swans kept us company, the nature was so beautiful! Gail, working in the office was very friendly and super helpful. A great stop off on our big east coast road trip!
Fantastic camp grounds close to town

Had a lovely week at this venue. Good amenities.  Close to the water. Easy walk to the shops.
Highly recommend.
Great park.
Clean and tidy and great amenities.Second time visiting the caravan park and love it.
Absolutely beautiful camping ground,  clean bathroom and toilets, will come back again!

Toilet/showers/kitchen so far away from unpowered camping section. I was assured when booking there was toilets close to the campsite, but these were disgusting public toilets - not impressed. Only 4 main showers and toilets for about 150 people. Would not recommend.

We are a family of 5 traveling Aus, we knew from past experiences that a lot of the caravan parks in Lakes are very hard to squeeze into and cost a bomb. I rung the Rec in the morning, left a message, hoping to snag a unpowered spot for 1 week. Within 1/2 hr we had a phone call back and we were booked in. |1/4 of the price any caravan park had available. The camp ground itself is very neat and tidy. We were so surprised with how busy it was. The site itself was nice and big and had direct access to the beach inlet. Super close to the main street. The amenities are fantastic :) beautiful and clean. We loved our stay, thankyou :)
Great powered sites by the water at a very good price. Updated facilities and close to the centre of town.
Location is great. Upkeep needed badly on road around the reserve. Bathrooms dirty regardless of what time of day or night we used them.
Value for money campsite

The van sites are right on the water. The showers, toilets and camp kitchen are new and lovely. The sites are tight and I thought it was a bit over priced but that is just because we had come from Shoalhaven which had great sites and prices. It rained the 3 days we were at Lakes Entrance and I am sure it is lovely in sunshine. Do yourself a favour and walk over for a feed at the Bowls club, best melt in your mouth steak ever from a farm at Kilmore. We got the surf and turf 😋

Loved staying here. Only stayed one night but would have no hesitation staying longer.
We camped in an unpowered site - a little far away from the amenities (I’m so lazy I actually drove), but the amenities were clean and modern.

Was a very peaceful campground. Would be incredible to stay here during footy season.

Will stay here again, no doubt!
Had a great few days would stay there again
Fabulous caravan park. Beautiful environment and wildlife

The amenities are nice and clean but the lady that works there is so rude. I had very minimal need to talk with her and each time was more unpleasant than the last. Despite telling me upon booking (and paying) that it was ok if we came after 5 (which I wasn’t) she called me 3 times before to make sure I would get there by 5. She was also extremely rude even once I got there before 5! This woman needs to find a job more suited to her crabby life, she doesn’t have a good demeanour for a service role
Well kept.  New toilet block
Stayed 2 nights powered sites.  Been renovated lovely spot

Friendly staff and great low cost camping ground. I’m really pleased to see council run camping grounds, there should be more of them around this country. Clean and modern facilities. We stayed in the unpowered section where nothing is supplied in regards to facilities but we did have a great view.

Great spot with majority of sites backing right onto the waters edge. Good clean facilities. Fantastic location; a few mins walk to Woolies and the promenade. Great caretakers and friendly local swans :)

We stayed here for just over a week & the park is really well kept by the friendly Managers.  The amenities & laundry are only 12 mths old & are kept spotlessly clean.  This park is right on the Lake & is in such a good spot.  It is within walking distance to the Bowls Club, Aldi, Woolworths, K Hub & the Information Centre.  We paid $120 for the week.  Stay for 7 pay for 6 deal.  We would highly recommend it.

We are from New Zealand and so there is that fear of booking your whole itinerary from afar; Gail (owner) made this experience so smooth and effortless. We had a beautiful spot booked on the waterfront, we arrived right before closing and got a beautiful sunset. Facilites are great, clean showers and toilets with secure code entry, BBQs in perfect condition, dish cleaning area and lots of bins to ensure all mess is contained. A great stay, I would definitely go again.
Great park. We stayed overnight on our way home Very clean amenities. 😊
Good camping good rates,staff helpful and cheerful

Great location on the water. Modern clean amenities, camp kitchen . Grassy sites.
Rates very competitive
Great caravan park, very clean, next to water, pet friendly and great location.
Great range of Asian and Western meals at a good price. Recommend the mango and calamari salad.

This campsite is a good central spot. It is about a 10-minute walk into town and the shopping area. The "camp kitchen" has BBQ stations, but no fridge, no stove top, and no appliances. The toilets and showers are closed to the powered campsite that we had and it was super clean with hot water! There is a laundry station as well as drying station. We love the view of the lake as well!
Enjoyed my stay, amenities we're modern and spotless caretakers we're very accommodating and all situated right on the water
Fabulous caravan park with friendly staff and brand new amenities at reasonable price.

Only place I would stay in lakes entrance Gail was great but Joe was absolutely awesome..
No wifi for guests..
Great sport. Close to everything.  Amenities new. Highly recommend.
Friendly & accommodating staff, 10 minute walk to everything, for a Rec reserve everything was spot on, ammenaties, right on the water, our overnight stay was spot on.... 👍👍
